Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver

Class RestoreRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver.RestoreRequest
  • public class RestoreRequest
extends Object
    Request object for restoring a backup to a database table.
    Since:
    0.2.25

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder builder()  
      String getBackupId()
      ID of the backup to restore from.
      String getKmsEncryptionKeyId()
      KMS encryption key identifier for encrypting the restored resource.
      String getRoleId()
      role id for restore operations requiring role-based authorization.
      String getTargetResource()
      Name of the target table to restore to.

      Vault identifier for backup vault-based restore operations.

      ID of the backup to restore from.

      role id for restore operations requiring role-based authorization.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • RestoreRequest

        public RestoreRequest()

      • RestoreRequest

        public RestoreRequest​(String backupId,
                      String targetResource,
                      String roleId,
                      String vaultId,
                      String kmsEncryptionKeyId)
        Creates a new RestoreRequest instance.
        Parameters:
        backupId - ID of the backup to restore from.
        targetResource - Name of the target table to restore to. If null or empty, restores to the original table name.
        roleId - role id for restore operations requiring role-based authorization. Some providers require an IAM role that the backup service assumes to perform the restore operation and create the restored resource.
        vaultId - Vault identifier for backup vault-based restore operations. Some providers use vault-based backup systems where the vault ID is required to locate and restore from a backup.
        kmsEncryptionKeyId - KMS encryption key identifier for encrypting the restored resource.

      • builder

        public static RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder builder()

        ID of the backup to restore from.

        public String getRoleId()
        role id for restore operations requiring role-based authorization. Some providers require an IAM role that the backup service assumes to perform the restore operation and create the restored resource.

      • getVaultId

        public String getVaultId()
        Vault identifier for backup vault-based restore operations. Some providers use vault-based backup systems where the vault ID is required to locate and restore from a backup.

        public String getKmsEncryptionKeyId()
        KMS encryption key identifier for encrypting the restored resource.

        public void setRoleId​(String roleId)
        role id for restore operations requiring role-based authorization. Some providers require an IAM role that the backup service assumes to perform the restore operation and create the restored resource.

      • setVaultId

        public void setVaultId​(String vaultId)
        Vault identifier for backup vault-based restore operations. Some providers use vault-based backup systems where the vault ID is required to locate and restore from a backup.

      • setKmsEncryptionKeyId

        public void setKmsEncryptionKeyId​(String kmsEncryptionKeyId)
        KMS encryption key identifier for encrypting the restored resource.
